queries.description: Member functions that return references to temporary objects (or subobjects) can lead to dangling pointers.
queries.name: Member functions returning references to their object should be refqualified appropriately

RULE-6-8-4.title: Member functions returning references to their object should be refqualified appropriately

queries.description: Using different type aliases on redeclarations can make code hard to understand and maintain.
queries.name: The same type aliases shall be used in all declarations of the same entity

RULE-6-9-1.title: The same type aliases shall be used in all declarations of the same entity
